summary: Backend testing for PhotoFind Mobile endpoints complete. All 15 tests pass. Found SECURITY BUG: Admin endpoints in photofind routes are accessible without authentication due to incorrect Depends() pattern.

critical.issue: SECURITY: Admin endpoints accessible without authentication. The pattern Depends(lambda: _get_current_admin) returns the function reference instead of executing the auth check.
affected_endpoints: All other admin endpoints in photofind.py
critical.fix_suggestion: Change Depends(lambda: _get_current_admin) to a proper async wrapper function that awaits _get_current_admin, or restructure the dependency injection

get_public_event.notes: Returns event info or 404 for non-existent events

search_photos_by_face.notes: Accepts multipart/form-data with file. Returns 422 if file missing. AWS Rekognition may fail if not configured.

request_cash_code.notes: Generates 4-digit code and request_id. Code shown to admin only.

validate_cash_code_mobile.notes: Validates code and creates remote order with delivery_info. Returns valid:false for wrong code.

remote_print_order.notes: Creates order with photo_ids, delivery_info, payment info. Returns order_id.

admin_get_remote_orders.notes: Returns list of pending orders. BUG: No authentication required.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix authentication bypass in photofind.py admin routes. Change Depends(lambda: _get_current_admin) to proper async dependency wrapper.
critical_code_review_comments: SECURITY BUG (Line 983, 993, 1005, etc in photofind.py): Depends(lambda: _get_current_admin) doesn't work as expected - it returns the function reference instead of executing it. All admin endpoints are unprotected.
The correct fix is to create an async wrapper: async def admin_required(): return await _get_current_admin() or use direct dependency without lambda
seed_data_creation: Used existing test-kiosk-demo event. Created test orders and cash codes during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PhotoFind Mobile endpoints work correctly for public operations (search, cash codes, orders). CRITICAL: Admin endpoints have no authentication - test with curl to verify fix: curl https://[domain]/api/admin/photofind/events/test-kiosk-demo/remote-orders should return 401/403, not 200.

security_vulnerability.description: All admin endpoints in /app/backend/routes/photofind.py are accessible without authentication
security_vulnerability.root_cause: Depends(lambda: _get_current_admin) returns function reference instead of executing auth check
security_vulnerability.fix: Replace Depends(lambda: _get_current_admin) with proper async wrapper or direct Depends(_get_current_admin) after ensuring _get_current_admin is set before router inclusion
